data.title: Alameda Research Unstakes $23M in Solana – Is a Major SOL Sell-Off Coming?
data.description:
The post Alameda Research Unstakes $23M in Solana – Is a Major SOL Sell-Off Coming? appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Alameda Research has unstaked $23 million worth of Solana (SOL), distributing it to 38 addresses linked to FTX. On-chain data from Arkham Intelligence confirms that these addresses, which have historically transferred SOL to major exchanges like Coinbase and Binance, now...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/alameda-research-unstakes-23m-in-solana-is-a-major-sol-sell-off-coming/

data.title: Who got wrecked and who won in the Wall Street sell-off?
data.description:
The current Wall Street sell-off has wiped out billions in market value, hammering tech giants, banks, and airlines while sending defensive stocks and overlooked companies higher. The S&P 500, after reaching a record high on February 19, has since dropped more than 9%, with the Nasdaq Composite sinking 13%, according to data from CNBC. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/who-got-wrecked-and-who-won-in-the-wall-street-sell-off/

data.title: BitMart launches Pell Network (PELL)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Pell Network (PELL) at 18:00 (Eastern Time) on March 13, and the PELL/USDT trading pair will be launched.
Pell Network has built a full-chain decentralized verification service network driven by BTC re-staking to expand BTCFi to the field of cryptoeconomic security and fully unleash the security potential of Bitcoin. Pell improves the capital efficiency of stakers and provides developers with an efficient, secure and affordable way to build verification services. Building on our pioneering full-chain BTC re-staking network, Pell will accelerate our expansion to build a comprehensive full-chain infrastructure for AI-driven decentralized finance (DeFAI).

data.title: Investor Alert As Popular Market News Account Is Compromised
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 13, the X account of db (@tier10k), a well-regarded source of market information, was hacked. Investors are advised to exercise caution regarding any content associated with this account.

data.title: Social Media Account Hacked, Fake News About Trump Circulates
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the social media user @tier10k announced on March 13 that their X account was hacked. The hacker used the account to disseminate false news regarding the practicality of 'TRUMP.'

data.title: Ripple receives Dubai Financial Services Authority license to provide crypto payment services in the UAE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Arif Amiri, CEO of Dubai International Financial Center (DIFC), said that Ripple has obtained full regulatory approval from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) to provide cross-border crypto payment services in the UAE. The company announced on March 13 that it had obtained its DFSA license, allowing it to operate in the Dubai International Financial Center (DIFC). DIFC is a free economic zone in the UAE with its own tax policies and regulatory framework. 
Earlier news, on October 1, 2024, Ripple revealed that they are working to obtain a DFSA license in order to launch its digital asset infrastructure in the UAE. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: CryptoQuant: Ethereum has seen record-breaking active selling in the past three months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant founder and CEO Ki Young Ju released data on the X platform saying that Ethereum has faced record active selling in the past 3 months.
